description: Product description Steam Eye Mask for Dry Eyes Our self heating steam eye mask contains pure cotton, medical fabric craft and elastic cotton material, comfortable and skin-friendly for your eyes. Just open and put on as the instructions, our self heating steam eye mask automatically release clean soothing moist heat and keeping warm about 40-60 minutes. No need to add water, no waiting and no mess! Enjoy an eye spa anytime anywhere. The moist heat provides eye fatigue relief in minutes. Steam eye mask will maintain prescribed heat levels for the entire treatment. Keep your eye moisturized. Gentle lavender fragrance make you more relaxing while enjoying this masks. Enjoy an anti-wrinkle revitalizing SPA treatment every day anywhere anytime Steam self-heating eye mask Eye Mask uses innovative self-heating technology, which heats the mask immediately after opening the package and continues to heat for about 30-40 minutes, at slightly above body temperature, this soothing heat is evenly distributed to help your tired eyes relax. Individually packaged and portable Each disposable heated eye mask is packaged separately. Very convenient. Take it with you - travel, business, plane, office and more. Benefits for Self Heated Eye Mask --Dry Eyes --Eye Fatigue --Itching/Irritation Safety Warning Do not use if you have difficulty breathing or removing the mask by yourself. Keep out of reach children. This product contains lavender, which may cause allergic reactions in some individuals.
